reviews.review_title: Completed in PC VR, solid on Quest
reviews.review_description: I played to the end of a slightly older version on PC VR, tried this out through the app lab to see how it is standalone and it holds up 100%. It covers an impressively expansive area for a standalone VR game. The movement options provide a good sense of space, scale, and freedom. There's enough variety in the upgrades, enemies and action to provide novelty from start to finish.
You had me at Roguevania! Really Cool game!  I've never played anything like Unification before. Unification has become one of my favorite games!
The mechanics are really cool. Love the ability to play with gravity. If you're new to VR, it might make you a bit dizzy at first, but is satisfying once you get the hang of it.
